title: filix × boottii
intro: Filix × boottii, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a rare, sterile, and intergeneric hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Cystopteris fragilis and the Gymnocarpium dryopteris. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Filix × boottii include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
